candidates.why: Header/group label for current assets, but not the reported total.
Component of current assets, not the total current assets target.
Generic component/header, not total current assets.
Exact reported total current assets line on the balance sheet; best match for ACT.

candidates.row_label: Working Capital excluding Other Current Assets & Liabilities
candidates.why: Derived metric, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.why: Includes short-term investments in addition to cash equivalents, so broader than CHE.
Exact match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Not present in preview; candidate wording suggests a possible alternate label, but exact present line is cleaner.
Broader cash-plus-investments concept and not exact preview wording.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.
Cash flow financing outflow, not cash balance.
Financing cash flow line, unrelated to cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Dividends Paid & Common Stock Buyback - Net
candidates.why: Cash flow financing measure, not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash line over broader cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Header/group label for current liabilities, but not the reported total.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component/subline, not total current liabilities.
Exact reported total current liabilities line; best match for LCT.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Wrong maturity bucket and only a component.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean reported total for short-term debt/current portion of LTD. Best match and preferable to summing components.
Likely only one component of STD and may exclude current maturities of long-term debt.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt only, not necessarily all short-term debt.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Used the clean total current debt line. Did not use component lines to avoid double counting. Although this total may include capitalized leases in some periods, it is the best reported total among candidates.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for TXP.
Combined long- and short-term tax payable line; less precise than short-term payable for TXP.
Deferred tax liability, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Deferred Tax & Investment Tax Credits - Long-Term
candidates.why: Deferred taxes, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this exact balance-sheet row clearly represents current taxes payable.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also a total net PPE measure, but the plain total net PPE line is cleaner and more standard.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Net
candidates.why: Only a component, not total PPE.
Component/other bucket, not total PPE.
Gross PPE exists, but net total is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Gross
candidates.why: Gross and adjusted variant; less preferred than net total.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Component only.
Component only.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE asset balance.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE asset balance.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE over gross or component lines.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Net
candidates.why: Single asset class, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Gross
candidates.why: Single asset class, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total/Unspecified - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total assets.
Single asset class, not total assets.

candidates.why: Supplemental asset class detail, not total assets.

candidates.why: Section/header label, not the final operating cash flow amount.

candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working capital changes, not final OANCF.
